observation: Creator capsule routes now cover 10 surfaces + 1 retained zine: poster, prompt DNA, motion storyboard, social card, p5 sketch, Remotion scene, Manim scene, TouchDesigner TOX, browser demo, and PDF zine. All retain real browser QA evidence. The next evolution pressure should mutate proof methods: giving creators a way to compare remix directions before final artifact generation.
population: creator proof method mutations: colorway previews, contact sheets, comparison surfaces that help creators select remix directions faster
selection_pressure: help a creator preview multiple remix directions from one capsule before committing to a final artifact — while preserving memory, proof, public boundary, and minimal DASH core size

candidates.mutation: Route the repo-local creator skill package into a reviewed external release checklist with install smoke, versioning, and rollback.
candidates.phenotype: Release contract and smoke script pending a reviewed registry target
candidates.risk: Could accidentally sync an unreviewed skill into live agents or publish private workflow assumptions.

candidates.mutation: Route the capsule into three public-safe colorway proofs so a creator can choose a remix direction before regenerating the final artifact.
candidates.phenotype: Deterministic colorway JSON plus fixed-canvas comparison sheet, deferred until two surfaces need the same palette proof
candidates.risk: Can become a palette dashboard unless it directly selects the next artifact mutation and blocks unsafe/raw reference inputs.

candidates.mutation: Route one capsule into a side-by-side fixed-canvas comparison sheet showing 2-3 surface outputs so a creator can validate cross-surface consistency before publication.
candidates.phenotype: Fixed-canvas HTML comparison board plus measure/print proof and machine gate, deferred until at least two surfaces produce compatible proof cards
candidates.risk: Can degrade into a gallery unless it directly helps creators spot cross-surface inconsistencies and reject bad mutations.

retained_routes.retained_as: generated TouchDesigner/twozero topology and safety handoff
printable six-panel one-sheet PDF zine surface

retention: Retain creator-pdf-zine-route as the public-safe bridge from capsule memory to a printable process artifact. Next active candidate: creator-colorway-remix-route — a proof method mutation for three public-safe colorway proofs to help creators choose remix directions before final artifact generation. Keep all retained winners for regression coverage.
